"def organize_medieval_items(items):  
    items_sorted = sorted(items)  
    result = {}  
    for item in items_sorted:  
        first_letter = item[0].lower()  
        if first_letter not in result:  
            result[first_letter] = []  
        result[first_letter].append(item)  
    return result
